item.title: Overnight
item.description: Bike related Pre-ride Clean/lube chain Charge lights Fill water bottles For the ride Spare tube Multi tool Hemlet Gloves Sunglasses First aid kit Sleep system (hammock option) Hammock Hammock straps Bug net Underquilt Pillow Sleeping bag Rain fly Tent stakes Hammer Sleep system (tent option) Tent Tent poles Footprint Rain fly Tent stakes Hammer Sleeping pad Sleeping bag Pillow Clothing Ride out Jersey or tank top Long-sleeved shirt Rain jacket Padded shorts Socks Bike shoes At camp Tank top Sweater Underoos Yoga pants Socks Camp shoes Ride back Jersey or tank top Padded shorts Socks Personal items Toothbrush Toothpaste Retainer case Contacts Glasses Floss Q-tips Deodorant Comb Cooking Cash for firewood Firestarter block Lighter Hotdog skewers Stove Fuel Kettle Coffee maker Cup/mug Fork/spoon Food Hotdogs (2) Hotdog buns (2) Ketchup/mustard Coffee Oatmeal Entertainment Headphones Device chargers Battery pack Board games Frisbee Camera Book Extras Wet wipes Bug spray Sunscreen Knife
